content.en:
The Tibetan God organized a dialogue between two True Spirit Realm powerhouses, and the beings in the universe did not know, and even if they knew, they would not react.

The great age has come, and it is natural for them to take every opportunity to transcend, even those who are not detached are desperately eager for transcendence.

Detachment is their only hope of survival, if they can't transcend, after thousands of years, the dual universe will collapse, and they will all die.

Under such circumstances, many Earth Lords are a little crazy.

Confusion!

There's chaos everywhere!

Maybe at the beginning, with the constraints of the strong and the restraint of the race, the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe were relatively stable, but now the two universes have expanded many times, and a large number of Earth Venerables and dimensional race forces have appeared.

In such a situation, even a two-star god general would not be able to stabilize the situation.

A strong person like Ye Tian can only ensure that the human race is not chaotic, and as for ensuring that the eternal universe is not chaotic, he is far from being able to do it.

In the Heavenly Pavilion.

A large number of strong people are cultivating in retreat, and countless resources have been distributed by Ye Tian, among which the powerhouses of the Earth Venerable Realm are naturally benefiting, obtaining massive resources, constantly improving the strength of their physical bodies, and constantly improving their strength.

Among them, Ye Tian's wife Xiao Yue and sister Ye Yu have obtained the highest training, and their strength has also been continuously improved.

In just a hundred years, they have been promoted to the level of the Nine-Star Earth Venerable, which was comparable to the level of the First Divine Lord of the Protoss in the past, but in today's era, the Nine-Star Earth Venerable is far from being a strong man.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian let Xiao Yue, Ye Yu and others enter the Qilin Palace, the source and other places of inheritance, so that their strength increased again, and they also obtained a lot of resources.

Of course, the human race and many powerhouses in the major holy lands of the eternal universe also knew about the source place and the Qilin Palace, among which the powerhouses of the Yuangu Holy Land had basically entered.

It's just that if the strength is too low, you won't get much benefit at all.

But even so, the strength of the Eternal Universe is also increasing rapidly.

this day.

Another layer of dimensional worlds shattered and merged into the main world, but a terrifying creature as large as the size of several star fields appeared, devouring countless stars as soon as it appeared, and even a few unlucky Earth Venerables were swallowed in one bite.

This giant beast has attracted the attention of many powerful people, and even some gods of the Cangyu Universe have also come to the Eternal Universe.

After Ye Tian got the news, he rushed over as soon as possible.

......

Lanchen Domain.

After making a fuss, the giant beast lay down in the starry sky and slowly fell into a deep sleep, like a boundless continent, but above it there was also a world, which was also the size of several star fields.

Before the giant beast woke up, it continued to devour matter, and no one dared to enter this world at all.

But now that the giant beast is sleeping, some people are beginning to be excited, and they want to enter this world to have a look, maybe there is a great opportunity.

However, soon many people despaired.

The world barriers of this world are too strong, and ordinary earth lords can't break through, and they can't enter at all.

Whoa!!

One by one, powerful Earth Lords arrived, and even the Yuan Gu God General and the Ten Thousand Law God General Ye Tian also came.

After Ye Tian arrived, he didn't greet the Yuan Gu God General for the first time, but used his copying talent to probe this giant beast, and this exploration was immediately shocked.

"Lazy Beast!"

Among the special creatures with super-god-level talents, the Lazy Beast was one of them, and it was the special creature he had been looking for.

It's a pity that the inert beast is so rare that it has been sleeping since it was born.

This time, the dimensional world shattered and merged into the main world, and the lazy beast woke up, made a fuss, and fell into a deep sleep again.

At this time, the talent of the lazy beast is clear at a glance.

Innate Beings: Lazy Beasts

Strength Talent: God

Defense Talent: God-level

Speed Talent: Top

Lazy Armor Talent: Super God Level

Devouring Talent: God-level

......

In terms of talent, this lazy beast's speed talent is rubbish, but its inert armor talent is too rebellious, reaching the super god level.

The inert armor talent is one of the earth attribute talents, and it can even be said to be the innate talent of the lazy beast, which is completely compatible with the body, and the countless scales on the inert beast's body are integrated into the inert armor talent, making it sleep, and the inert armor talent is in a fully open state.

Moreover, the body of the inert beast is very terrifying, and it has reached the extreme of a two-star god general, and if it is coupled with the inert armor talent, even a three-star god general may not be able to hurt it.

"When I knew that there was an inert beast before, I thought that the two-star god general would be able to hurt it, but now when I look at its body, I know that the two-star god will not be able to hurt it at all. However, the others don't know that the Lazy Beast has the talent of Lazy Armor, and it's because it's an ordinary two-star god-level creature!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Although the two-star god-level creatures are powerful, they can fall into a deep sleep and are defenseless, and some one-star god-level generals may be tempted to subdue or kill this lazy beast.

Ye Tian first copied the super god-level lazy armor talent, and then stood there watching the play.

Soon.

Another batch of earth lords and gods will arrive, and one of the gods will be one of the new god generals of the ancient universe - the stone dragon god general!

When the stone dragon god general was still a ten-star earth lord before, he was attacked and killed by the Tibetan God Organization Zhang Ling, and almost fell, but he also made a breakthrough between life and death, and stepped into the combat power of the one-star god general in one fell swoop.

In addition to the stone dragon god generals, the five god generals of the Cangyu universe also appeared.

These five gods are the Tieyu Divine General, the Spirit Emperor Divine General, the Imperial Dragon Divine General, the Zhenhai Divine General, and the Sun Divine General.

At this time, Ye Tian, Shilong Divine General, and Yuangu Divine General will be closer, while the five major gods of the Cangyu Universe will be closer, and they will belong to two camps.

"What kind of monster is this?"

The Spirit Emperor God General said curiously.

"I don't know!"

The other gods shook their heads, they didn't know any lazy beasts, after all, lazy beasts were too rare, and with their knowledge, they wouldn't know.

"This is a powerful creature at the level of a two-star god general, my cultivation needs the bloodline of some powerful creatures, if I kill it, I may be able to break the shackles and be promoted to a two-star god general. "

The dragon god will make a move, and as soon as he strikes, it is a trick, aiming at the head of the lazy beast.

In his opinion, the lazy beast of the two-star god general was defenseless and could be easily killed.

It's like other two-star gods in the universe, if they stand there and don't move, they won't do any defense, and they will be killed by him in seconds.

Rumble!!!!

The Dragon Warrior's spear slammed into the indolent beast's head, making a metallic crash that shook the void.

However, such a terrifying attack only caused the lazy beast to shake its body for a moment, and it was still sleeping, not waking up at all, and the inert beast's head was intact.

"What!"

The Dragon Divine General was shocked, and the other Divine Generals were also dumbfounded, only Ye Tian looked at all this very calmly, and he didn't feel strange at all.

Not to mention that the dragon god will make a move, even if it is a joint attack by those two star gods in the Cangyu universe, at most it will wake up the lazy beast, don't want to kill the lazy beast.
